fr.label: Tous les processus requis sont actifs

MaxUptime.query: SELECT 'System not restarted in ' || (total_seconds / 86400) || ' days' AS error FROM uptime WHERE total_seconds / 86400 > 30;

LockScreen.query:
WITH
  sid AS (SELECT uuid FROM users WHERE username = '{{username}}'),
  inactivity_lock AS (SELECT CAST(data AS INTEGER) AS val FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\InactivityTimeoutSecs' AND CAST(data AS INTEGER) >= 1),
  inactivity_lock_ok AS (SELECT 1 FROM inactivity_lock WHERE val <= 600),
  screensaver_active AS (SELECT 1 FROM registry WHERE (path = 'HKEY_USERS\' || (SELECT uuid FROM sid) || '\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Control Panel\Desktop\ScreenSaveActive' OR path = 'HKEY_USERS\' || (SELECT uuid FROM sid) || '\Control Panel\Desktop\ScreenSaveActive') AND data = '1'),
  screensaver_secured AS (SELECT 1 FROM registry WHERE (path = 'HKEY_USERS\' || (SELECT uuid FROM sid) || '\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Control Panel\Desktop\ScreenSaverIsSecure' OR path = 'HKEY_USERS\' || (SELECT uuid FROM sid) || '\Control Panel\Desktop\ScreenSaverIsSecure') AND data = '1'),
  screensaver_timeout AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT CAST(data AS INTEGER) FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_USERS\' || (SELECT uuid FROM sid) || '\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Control Panel\Desktop\ScreenSaveTimeOut'), (SELECT CAST(data AS INTEGER) FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_USERS\' || (SELECT uuid FROM sid) || '\Control Panel\Desktop\ScreenSaveTimeOut')) AS val),
  screensaver_ok AS (SELECT 1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_active) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_secured) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_timeout WHERE val IS NOT NULL AND val > 600)),
  active_scheme_guid AS (SELECT data AS guid FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power\User\PowerSchemes\ActivePowerScheme'),
  sleep_timer_ac AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT CAST(data AS INTEGER) FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power\User\PowerSchemes\' || (SELECT guid FROM active_scheme_guid) || '\7516b95f-f776-4464-8c53-06167f40cc99\3c0bc021-c8a8-4e07-a973-6b14cbcb2b7e\ACSettingIndex'), (SELECT CAST(data AS INTEGER) FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power\User\PowerSchemes\' || (SELECT guid FROM active_scheme_guid) || '\238c9fa8-0aad-41ed-83f4-97be242c8f20\29f6c1db-86da-48c5-9fdb-f2b67b1f44da\ACSettingIndex')) AS val),
  sleep_timer_dc AS (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT CAST(data AS INTEGER) FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power\User\PowerSchemes\' || (SELECT guid FROM active_scheme_guid) || '\7516b95f-f776-4464-8c53-06167f40cc99\3c0bc021-c8a8-4e07-a973-6b14cbcb2b7e\DCSettingIndex'), (SELECT CAST(data AS INTEGER) FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power\User\PowerSchemes\' || (SELECT guid FROM active_scheme_guid) || '\238c9fa8-0aad-41ed-83f4-97be242c8f20\29f6c1db-86da-48c5-9fdb-f2b67b1f44da\DCSettingIndex')) AS val),
  sleep_sign_in_disabled AS (SELECT 1 FROM registry WHERE (path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power\User\PowerSchemes\' || (SELECT guid FROM active_scheme_guid) || '\fea3413e-7e05-4911-9a71-700331f1c294\0e796bdb-100d-47d6-a2d5-f7d2daa51f51\ACSettingIndex' OR path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power\User\PowerSchemes\' || (SELECT guid FROM active_scheme_guid) || '\fea3413e-7e05-4911-9a71-700331f1c294\0e796bdb-100d-47d6-a2d5-f7d2daa51f51\DCSettingIndex') AND CAST(data AS INTEGER) = 0),
  sleep_lock_ok AS (SELECT 1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_timer_ac WHERE val IS NOT NULL AND val BETWEEN 1 AND 600) AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_timer_dc WHERE val IS NOT NULL AND val BETWEEN 1 AND 600) OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_timer_dc WHERE val IS NOT NULL)) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_sign_in_disabled))
SELECT 'Screen lock inactivity timeout too high (' || val || 's)' AS error FROM inactivity_lock WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inactivity_lock_ok)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Screen saver active but sign-in not required on resume' AS error WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inactivity_lock) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_lock_ok) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_active) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_secured)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Screen saver timeout too high (' || val || 's)' AS error FROM screensaver_timeout WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inactivity_lock) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_lock_ok) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_active) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_secured) AND val IS NOT NULL AND val > 600
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sign-in not required on wake from sleep' AS error WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inactivity_lock) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_lock_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_active) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_sign_in_disabled)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sleep timeout too high on AC (' || val || 's)' AS error FROM sleep_timer_ac WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inactivity_lock) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_lock_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_active) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_sign_in_disabled) AND val IS NOT NULL AND val > 600
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Sleep timeout too high on battery (' || val || 's)' AS error FROM sleep_timer_dc WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inactivity_lock) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_lock_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_active) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_sign_in_disabled) AND val IS NOT NULL AND val > 600
UNION ALL
SELECT 'No screen lock configured' AS error WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM inactivity_lock) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_lock_ok) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM screensaver_active) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_sign_in_disabled) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_timer_ac WHERE val IS NOT NULL AND val > 600) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sleep_timer_dc WHERE val IS NOT NULL AND val > 600)

Firewall.query: SELECT 'Firewall status: ' || firewall AS error FROM windows_security_center WHERE firewall != 'Good';

ProtectionStatus.query:
SELECT 'internet settings = ' || internet_settings AS error FROM windows_security_center WHERE internet_settings != 'Good'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Windows Security Center = ' || windows_security_center_service AS error FROM windows_security_center WHERE windows_security_center_service != 'Good'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'User Account Control = ' || user_account_control AS error FROM windows_security_center WHERE user_account_control != 'Good';

en.label: Windows Security Centre features are active

fr.label: Fonctionnalités Windows Security Centre sont activées

AutoUpdates.query:
SELECT
  CASE CAST(data AS INTEGER)
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Automatic updates disabled'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Automatic updates: notify only, no download'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Automatic updates: auto-download but manual install required'
    ELSE 'Automatic updates: unexpected configuration value ' || data
  END AS error
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN policies.name IS NOT NULL THEN policies.data
      ELSE normal.data
    END AS data
  FROM
    (SELECT name,data FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WindowsUpdate\AU\AUOptions') AS policies
  FULL OUTER JOIN
    (SELECT name,data FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WindowsUpdate\Auto Update\AUOptions') AS normal
  ON 1=1
) AS update_policy
WHERE CAST(data AS INTEGER) < 4
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Automatic updates disabled via policy' AS error FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WindowsUpdate\AU\NoAutoUpdate' AND data = '1'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Windows Update service not running' AS error FROM services WHERE name = 'wuauserv' AND status != 'RUNNING';

fr.label: Mises à jour automatiques sont activées

Antivirus.query: SELECT 'Antivirus status: ' || antivirus AS error FROM windows_security_center WHERE antivirus != 'Good';

SharingPreferences.query:
SELECT 'Remote Desktop is enabled' AS error FROM registry WHERE path = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server\fDenyTSConnections' AND data = '0'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Non-admin file share exists: ' || name AS error FROM shared_resources WHERE type = 0 AND name NOT LIKE '%$'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Remote Registry is enabled' AS error FROM services WHERE name = 'RemoteRegistry' AND status = 'RUNNING';

SSHKeys.query: SELECT path AS error FROM user_ssh_keys WHERE encrypted = 0;

RemovableStorage.query: SELECT 'Removable storage device connected: ' || device_id AS error FROM logical_drives WHERE description LIKE '%Removable%';

SensitiveFiles.query: SELECT replace(path, 'C:\\Users\\{{username}}\\', '') AS error FROM file WHERE directory = 'C:\\Users\\{{username}}\\Downloads' AND (filename LIKE '%backup%code%' OR filename LIKE '%recovery%code%' OR filename LIKE '%password%') AND btime <= (strftime('%s','now') - (7 * 24 * 60 * 60));

ExportedFiles.query: SELECT replace(path, 'C:\\Users\\{{username}}\\', '') AS error FROM file WHERE directory = 'C:\\Users\\{{username}}\\Downloads' AND (filename LIKE '%export%.csv' OR filename LIKE '%export%.json' OR filename LIKE '%export%.txt' OR filename LIKE '%export%.xls' OR filename LIKE '%export%.xlsx') AND btime <= (strftime('%s','now') - (30 * 24 * 60 * 60));

UnusedFiles.query: SELECT replace(path, 'C:\\Users\\{{username}}\\', '') AS error FROM file WHERE directory = 'C:\\Users\\{{username}}\\Downloads' AND btime <= (strftime('%s','now') - (90 * 24 * 60 * 60));
